chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1777 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.7671/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 23.01.2024 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Faheem Makhdoom and Ayaz Ali Makhdoom, Assistant Executive Engineers, Kandiaro Band Sub-Division and Tharu Shah Sub-Division respectively, undertake that after 26th of this month, water for irrigation purpose would be provided to petitioners as per their share in the water share list. Learned Counsel for petitioner and petitioners are satisfied, and accordingly, this petition, in above terms, is disposed of along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
